## Safety notice
Never share passwords, private keys, customer data, real domains/IPs, or unsanitized logs.

## What you already checked
- [ ] Port 587 STARTTLS cert check
- [ ] Port 465 SSL cert check
- [ ] `vmail_ssl.map` exists
- [ ] Ran fix mode (or manual postmap + service restart)

## Sanitized details
- Host used (example format): `mail.example.com`
- Issue description:

## Sanitized command outputs
```text
Paste sanitized output only.
```

## Questions
What specific help do you need?
